file_insights.changes: Updated print_state_group function to prepend bullet point (●) to state group header

line_changes.line_5: Removed unused BOLD constant from colors import
line_changes.line_74: Changed format string from '{}{}{} ({})' to '{}● {}{}({})', adding bullet point after state_ansi color code

patterns_discovered.pattern: Minimal targeted changes with import cleanup
patterns_discovered.description: BOLD import removed immediately after format string was simplified, indicating tight coupling between format logic and imports
patterns_discovered.significance: Good code hygiene - removing unused symbols in same commit

patterns_discovered.description: Bullet point (●) placed directly after ANSI color code to ensure color applies to visual marker
patterns_discovered.significance: Maintains consistent visual styling and color application scope

patterns_discovered.pattern: Single file modification for UI enhancement
patterns_discovered.description: Localized change in one function (print_state_group) with no cascade effects
patterns_discovered.significance: Low risk refactoring with clear scope

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Color code positioning with new prefix character
gotchas_discovered.description: Bullet point must come after state_ansi() call to inherit color styling; moving it would break visual consistency
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Format tuple structure ensures correct precedence

approach_outcome.task_completed: Update state group headers to show count with bullet: '● running (2)'
approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Direct format string modification with companion import cleanup

recommendations.rationale: Unicode bullet points and ANSI colors have terminal-dependent rendering; automated tests would catch regressions across different terminal types

recommendations.recommendation: Consider column alignment if multiple state headers are displayed
recommendations.rationale: Bullet point adds variable-width character; verify that list output remains visually aligned

recommendations.recommendation: Document the bullet convention for users
recommendations.rationale: CLI users should understand that ● prefix indicates a state group header with count in parentheses
